name: ASRock A620M-HDV/M.2 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-5600+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - Realtek GbE LAN
